name: Revolution: Oohashi's Mod
description:
Welcome to the Bauer Kingdom! Get your start as an up and coming mage, we're now accepting students from all walks of life, no matter if you're a noble or not, for success comes from the Royal Academy!

Experience the world of Revolution, the RPG that gave rise to "I Favor The Villainess" in a new light! Due to an unforeseen bug, we have been forced to patch the game to make room for a new character. As such, this may cause the plot to deviate from what we had originally planned!

This RPG bot does not directly follow the plot of the light novel/manga/anime because Rae has "officially" been added in as a character. Instead YOU are the main character, the commoner (or noble) that got to go to the Royal Academy.

Personality template created by Dezea.
creator: Comanche99
